item.title: About
item.description: Hemlig turns AI privacy and agent research into commercial products. We work with companies that expose AI APIs, RAG systems, and tool-calling agents to public users, where privacy failures can become customer, compliance, and brand risks. We also help teams improve AI-search visibility and provide a multi-model agent for stronger CVs, resumes, statements, and application packages. Our team combines PhD-level research experience with practical product engineering. The result is focused implementation: privacy controls that fit real systems, content strategy that improves discoverability, and agents that help users reach concrete outcomes.

item.description: Tell us whether you need SecureRAG Gateway, AI Search Growth, CareerLift Agent, or a custom multi-model workflow. Your Email: Subject: Your message: Send Message

item.title: Research Highlights
item.description: Hemlig is built by researchers and engineers working on privacy-preserving machine learning, foundation model privacy, RAG security, and agentic AI systems. We keep the research layer practical: every method we use should help a real team reduce leakage, improve discovery, or produce better application material. Privacy-Preserving RAG Our privacy product is informed by work on differentially private retrieval augmented generation with random projection. The goal is simple: let teams retrieve useful knowledge while reducing the chance that private documents, user records, or sensitive attributes can be reconstructed through model outputs or repeated queries.
